item.title: Bangs of the Duck
item.description: DuckDuckGo Bangs - A quick search hack, that I stumbled upon! DuckDuckGo 🔥, is my personal favorite search engine which I have been using since my bachelor years. The primary reason is what I search for stops at the results page and has never followed me to the other webpages I visit. Read this post as I backtrack the response from DuckDuckGo when I searched mv file !$ and ended up with odd results.

item.title: Under the Hood of React CRA
item.description: React Engine - Intro If you are aware of Webpack & Babel, I suggest you skip to the code part to set your own minimal React Server React CRA (Create-React-App), is a great package for devs getting started on React. It has the all the parts - loaders, configs, builds, templates, plugins - It is bootstrapped package for you, to get started working on your React App. It is recommended for everyone, who wants to learn React quick and people looking to learn their first JS framework.

item.title: Privacy
item.description: Trackers Google Analytics : Tracking Overview Fonts : Google Fonts Hosted on Github Pages: Github Pages Comments read/written to GH Issues: Utterances Github App
